ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "education" INTEGER /* Education level of the individual */,
  "log_wage" REAL /* Logarithm of the individual's wage */,
  "potential_experience" INTEGER /* Potential experience of the individual */,
  "time_trend" INTEGER /* Time trend of the individual's data */,
  "ability" REAL /* Ability score of the individual */,
  "mother_ed" INTEGER /* Mother's education level */,
  "father_ed" INTEGER /* Father's education level */,
  "broken_home" INTEGER /* Binary indicator for broken home */,
  "siblings" INTEGER /* Number of siblings */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Birth year of the individual */,
  "current_age" INTEGER /* Current age of the individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the individual */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the individual is employed */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the individual */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the individual */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Last update date of the individual's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_ability FOREIGN KEY ("ability") REFERENCES ability_scores ("ability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_mother_ed FOREIGN KEY ("mother_ed") REFERENCES family_backgrounds ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, PhD) */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study (e.g., Engineering, Arts) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ability_scores" (
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ability score */,
  "ability_score" REAL /* Description of the ability score */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test used to measure ability (e.g., IQ test, aptitude test) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_backgrounds" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family background */,
  "mother_ed" INTEGER /* Mother's education level */,
  "father_ed" INTEGER /* Father's education level */,
  "siblings" INTEGER /* Number of siblings */,
  "family_income" REAL /* Family income */,
  "parental_marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the parents */,
  "parental_employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the parents */,
  "sibling_ages" TEXT /* Ages of the siblings */,
  "sibling_education_levels" TEXT /* Education levels of the siblings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the dataset */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last modified */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., survey, census) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individual_datasets" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the individual was added to the dataset */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date when the individual was removed from the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken to respond to the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was updated */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., insert, delete, modify) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
